title: bupleurum exaltatum var. oligactis
intro: Bupleurum exaltatum var. oligactis, also known as Chinese Bupleurum or Chai Hu, is a plant species in the carrot family, native to China and used in traditional Chinese medicine. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities, as well as its ability to regulate immune function and reduce fever. The health benefits of Bupleurum exaltatum var. oligactis include relieving symptoms of common colds, flu, and respiratory infections, as well as reducing stress and anxiety. Bupleurum exaltatum var. oligactis is commonly prepared in herbal teas, capsules, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
